summary: All 6 UI/admin panel changes verified. Tests 1-5 passed immediately. Test 6 had stale test data (a 'New Section' added by iteration 49 Playwright test was in DB, blocking default section injection). Cleaned up via API (set checkout_sections to '[]') and re-tested — confirmed pass.
action_items: INFORMATIONAL: Test 6 initially failed because iteration_49 Playwright tests left a stale 'New Section' (id=cs_tvbdt4) in the checkout_sections DB field. This blocked the backend migration logic (which only injects defaults when checkout_sections is []). Cleared via PUT /api/admin/website-settings with checkout_sections='[]'. Feature is working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: The checkout_sections migration in website.py only injects defaults when DB value is exactly []. If a test or user adds even one section and then deletes it via UI (leaving []), it works. But there's no 'reset to defaults' option in the UI — admins must manually clear via API if they want to restore defaults. Consider adding a 'Reset to Defaults' button in the Checkout Builder UI.
seed_data_creation: Cleared stale 'New Section' (cs_tvbdt4) from checkout_sections by setting it to '[]' via admin API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 iteration 50 items tested and confirmed working. Checkout sections DB was reset to [] (which triggers default injection of Zoho Account Details + Partner Tagging sections on GET). Admin: admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!. The DB checkout_sections is now [] (defaults are injected on-the-fly by the GET endpoint).
passed_tests: Test 1: Zoho System Links card shown ABOVE references list with 5 SettingRow items (zoho_reseller_signup_us, zoho_reseller_signup_ca, zoho_partner_tag_us, zoho_partner_tag_ca, zoho_access_instructions_url)
Test 2: No 'Partner Tagging (Legacy)' or 'Zoho Account Details (Legacy)' toggles in Auth & Pages > Checkout Flow. Only Checkout Page Builder and Checkout Success tiles present.

Test 3: No standalone 'GoCardless Callback' tile. Checkout Success slide-over contains 'GoCardless Callback Page' sub-section with processing/success/error fields (ws-gc-proc-title, ws-gc-succ-title, ws-gc-err-title).
Test 4: Email Templates Integrations section shows Resend as a TILE (not expanded form). Clicking tile opens slide panel with toggle (data-testid=toggle-email-provider) and provider settings.
Test 5a: Commerce section order — Orders → Promo Codes → Quote Requests (correct)
Test 5b: Content section — Override Codes appears BEFORE Categories (correct)
Test 5c: Website section — Website Content followed by Logs (correct)
Test 5d: No 'Settings' section header in sidebar nav (correct)
Test 6a: No 'Visibility Toggles' section in Checkout Builder slide
Test 6b: No static 'Zoho Account Settings' form in Checkout Builder
Test 6c: No static 'Partner Tagging Settings' form in Checkout Builder
Test 6d: Dynamic Sections builder (checkout-sections-builder) is present
Test 6e: 'Zoho Account Details' section pre-populated in builder (id=cs_zoho_account)
Test 6f: 'Have you tagged us as your Zoho Partner?' section pre-populated (id=cs_partner_tagging)
